# PSMMC dashboard moved

The PSMMC pharmacy dashboard now lives in its own repository:
**https://github.com/akoz20100-blip/Dashboard** → `psmmc-military/`
Live: https://akoz20100-blip.github.io/Dashboard/psmmc-military/

The old `/psmmc/` link on this repo's gh-pages now redirects there, and the
publishing workflow (`psmmc-pages.yml.retired`) is disabled so it no longer
overwrites that redirect. Re-enable only if you intentionally move the
dashboard back here.
